modules.discoverSubtitle: Turn your offering into real French players — customers, channels and ecosystem
modules.intentAction: Review the open tender(s) and engage the buyer's procurement team
modules.eventsSubtitle: Major French trade shows and conferences worth attending
modules.newsSubtitle: Business news turned into actionable signals
modules.brandsSubtitle: Trademark search and conflict analysis (INPI / EUIPO / WIPO)
modules.creditMethodTitle: What the scores mean & how they are built
modules.creditMethodIntro: The Trust Score is the average of the 5 dimensions below. Every score runs 0–100 — higher is better (for risk dimensions, higher means lower risk).
modules.creditDisclaimer: Scores are algorithmic estimates from public data, for initial guidance only. They are not a credit report, a credit rating, or investment/transaction advice.
modules.dimFinancialHealth: Financial Health — profitability and scale, driven by the company's real revenue and net margin (data.gouv.fr).
modules.dimPaymentRisk: Payment Risk — likelihood of paying on time (payment incidents, average days-to-pay / DSO). A higher score means lower default risk.
modules.dimSupplierReliability: Supplier Reliability — delivery consistency and contract continuity as a supplier.
modules.dimLegalRisk: Legal Risk — driven by real BODACC notices (insolvency / recovery procedures, etc.). A higher score means lower legal risk.
modules.dimGrowth: Growth — momentum in revenue, headcount and market share.

cost.disclaimer: Estimates from curated 2026 French benchmarks — indicative only, not a quote or financial advice.

services.ctaPartner: Get help from a certified partner
services.partnerNote: We connect you with vetted local partners (lawyers, accountants, IP agents) to handle the whole process for you.
services.disclaimer: General guidance only — not legal advice.
services.companyTitle: Set up a company in France
services.companyIntro: A practical overview of registering a French company (SAS / SARL …).
companySteps: Choose a legal form (SAS/SASU, SARL/EURL…) and draft the articles of association
Deposit the share capital into a dedicated bank account
Publish an incorporation notice in a legal-notices journal (annonce légale)
File online via INPI's one-stop shop (Guichet unique, replaced the CFE in 2023)
Receive your SIREN / SIRET and Kbis extract
Register for intra-EU VAT and, if needed, social-security / employer status
services.brandIntro: A practical overview of protecting your brand via INPI (France) or EUIPO (EU-wide).
brandSteps: Run an availability / prior-rights search in the INPI database
Pick your goods & services classes (Nice Classification)
File online with INPI (France) — or EUIPO for EU-wide protection
Formal and substantive examination by the office

items.a: FranceGo is an AI-powered platform that helps foreign companies enter and grow in the French market, combining real French company, tender, funding, subsidy and compliance data with AI analysis.

items.q: Where does the data come from?
items.a: From official French and EU open data sources: INSEE/SIRENE company registry, BOAMP and TED public tenders, Eurostat market statistics and BODACC legal notices — refreshed in real time.
The entire product and content are available in English, French and Chinese.
There is a free plan with 10 searches per day. Professional is €99/month and Business is €299/month. Enterprise pricing is custom.

items.q: Do I need a credit card to start?
items.a: No. You can create a free account and explore the French market without a credit card.

finalCta.title: Ready to land in France?
finalCta.subtitle: Create your free account in under a minute.

playbooks.subtitle: Step-by-step, sourced workflows for executing in France — e.g. setting up a data center.

playbooks.title: Playbooks
playbooks.subtitle: AI-draft, review and publish playbooks. Drafts stay hidden from the public site until published.
playbooks.editSubtitle: Review AI-drafted content. Publish is in the 'Verify & Publish' tab — it unlocks only after you confirm authorities and links.

requests.title: Playbook requests
requests.subtitle: Customer demand for new playbooks. Triage here; author the playbook in code, then sync.

generator.heading: AI draft a new playbook
generator.desc: Generates a grounded DRAFT (real authorities/links from the Knowledge Base) for you to review and publish. Never auto-published.
generator.placeholder: e.g. Selling French wine to China / Opening a restaurant in Paris

editor.name: Name
editor.verifyDesc: Confirm each authority name and reference URL is real and correct. AI can hallucinate these. Publish unlocks only when all are confirmed and no link is broken.
editor.publishHint: Confirm all items (and fix broken links) to enable.
